name: RSR Grand Taekwondo
nameThai: อาร์เอสอาร์ แกรนด์ เทควันโด
addressFull: 88/82, Wonder Space Pattaya, Nong Prue, Bang Lamung, Chon Buri 20150
hours: Tue-Sun 10:00-20:00; Monday closed, according to the current operator-post mirror and Google listing

federation.evidence: The academy is listed by Super 7 as a verified partner and its students enter RSR competitions; no named federation membership or grading-recognition statement was found.

practical.notes: A recent Thai parent review describes the venue as comfortable for waiting parents.

praise: Recent Thai parents praise attentive teaching, a warm community and a clean, orderly gym.
One review specifically says the waiting environment is convenient for parents.

sources.label: Google Maps current listing and Thai reviews
Saint Dominic School 2026 Pattaya championship result

confidenceReason: Four sources establish an active family-oriented academy, but all prices, formal federation/grading status and English instruction are missing.
